title: 10 health benefits of Bidens tripartita (bur marigold)
intro: Bidens tripartita has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's leaves and flowers contain flavonoids, terpenes, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. These benefits can improve people's lives by providing relief from skin irritations, wound healing, and respiratory issues. For instance, bur marigold infusions can be used topically to soothe eczema and other skin conditions, while inhaling the plant's steam may help alleviate bronchitis symptoms.
